title: ligustrum compactum var. velutinum
intro: Ligustrum compactum var. velutinum, also known as Velvet Privet, is a shrubby evergreen plant native to China, belonging to the Oleaceae family. Traditionally, Velvet Privet has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and soothing digestive issues. Velvet Privet can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and its leaves and berries are commonly used in traditional Chinese herbal preparations.
